action.reasoning: Observation: First training was very slow (~84 min for 2 epochs) and val F1 dropped from 0.0319 → 0.0037 due to aggressive WeightedRandomSampler on rare classes. I have 6.6h left and 28 iterations. Analysis: Need to (1) submit current best checkpoint to validate eval pipeline, (2) restart training with better strategy: CLIP ViT-L/14 with standard sampling, lower LR for backbone, no aggressive oversampling. Decision: First submit current best.pt to baseline the eval pipeline while planning a better training run.
action.command: ls -la checkpoints/ && python -c "import torch; c=torch.load('checkpoints/best.pt', map_location='cpu'); print(c['model_name'], c['num_classes'])"
